panels.description: Reporting node count split by role (liaison / data).
panels.title: Nodes by Role

panels.description: Total CPU cores across the selected nodes.
panels.title: Total CPU Cores

panels.description: Total used physical memory across the selected nodes.
panels.title: Total Memory Used

panels.description: Total used disk across the selected nodes and all storage paths.
panels.title: Total Disk Used

panels.description: Per-node health snapshot: role, uptime, CPU cores used, RSS, system memory %, and disk % (across all paths).

targets.expr: sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="used"}) by (pod_name) / sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="total"}) by (pod_name)

panels.title: Per-node Health

panels.description: CPU cores used per node (rate of process_cpu_seconds_total).
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description: System memory used percent per node (from kind=used_percent).
panels.title: System Memory %

panels.description: Disk used / total per node (aggregated across all storage paths).

targets.expr: sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="used"}) by (pod_name) / sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="total"}) by (pod_name)

panels.title: Disk Usage %

panels.description: On-disk usage per node and storage path.
panels.title: Disk Used by Path

panels.description: Disk capacity per node and storage path.
panels.title: Disk Total by Path

panels.description: Disk used percent per node and storage path.

targets.expr: sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="used"}) by (pod_name, path) / sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="total"}) by (pod_name, path)

panels.title: Disk Used % by Path

panels.description: Average GC pause duration per node.

targets.expr: sum(rate(go_gc_duration_seconds_sum{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (pod_name) / sum(rate(go_gc_duration_seconds_count{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (pod_name)

panels.title: GC Pause (avg)

panels.description: Heap next-GC threshold and allocation rate per node.
panels.title: Heap Next-GC / Alloc Rate
